sentences.text: The Zilsd & Zclsd extensions provide load/store pair instructions for RV32, reusing the existing RV64 doubleword load/store instruction encodings.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0

sentences.text: Operands containing `src` for store instructions and `dest` for load instructions are held in aligned `x`-register pairs, i.e., register numbers must be even.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0

sentences.text: Use of misaligned (odd-numbered) registers for these operands is reserved.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0

sentences.text: Regardless of endianness, the lower-numbered register holds the low-order bits, and the higher-numbered register holds the high-order bits: e.g., bits 31:0 of an operand in Zilsd might be held in register `x14`, with bits 63:32 of that operand held in `x15`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0

sentences.text: The Zilsd extension adds the following RV32-only instructions:
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: | |RV32 |RV64 |Mnemonic |Instruction
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: |yes |no |ld rd, offset(rs1) |
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: |yes |no |sd rs2, offset(rs1) |
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: As the access size is 64-bit, accesses are only considered naturally aligned for effective addresses that are a multiple of 8.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: In this case, these instructions are guaranteed to not raise an address-misaligned exception.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: Even if naturally aligned, the memory access might not be performed atomically.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: If the effective address is a multiple of 4, then each word access is required to be performed atomically.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: The following table summarizes the required behavior:
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: | |Alignment |Word accesses guaranteed atomic? |Can cause misaligned trap? |8{nbsp}B |yes |no |4{nbsp}B not 8{nbsp}B |yes |yes |else |no | yes |
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: To ensure resumable trap handling is possible for the load instructions, the base register must have its original value if a trap is taken.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: The other register in the pair can have been updated.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: This affects x2 for the stack pointer relative instruction and rs1 otherwise.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd)

sentences.text: Zclsd depends on Zilsd and Zca.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Compressed Load/Store pair instructions (Zclsd)

sentences.text: It has overlapping encodings with Zcf and is thus incompatible with Zcf.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Compressed Load/Store pair instructions (Zclsd)

sentences.text: Zclsd adds the following RV32-only instructions:
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Compressed Load/Store pair instructions (Zclsd)

sentences.text: | |RV32 |RV64 |Mnemonic |Instruction
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Compressed Load/Store pair instructions (Zclsd)

sentences.text: |yes |no |c.ldsp rd, offset(sp) |
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Compressed Load/Store pair instructions (Zclsd)

sentences.text: |yes |no |c.sdsp rs2, offset(sp) |
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Compressed Load/Store pair instructions (Zclsd)

sentences.text: |yes |no |c.ld rd', offset(rs1') |
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Compressed Load/Store pair instructions (Zclsd)

sentences.text: |yes |no |c.sd rs2', offset(rs1') |
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Compressed Load/Store pair instructions (Zclsd)

sentences.text: LD instructions with destination `x0` are processed as any other load, but the result is discarded entirely and x1 is not written.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Use of x0 as operand

sentences.text: For C.LDSP, usage of `x0` as the destination is reserved.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Use of x0 as operand

sentences.text: If using `x0` as `src` of SD or C.SDSP, the entire 64-bit operand is zero — i.e., register `x1` is not accessed.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Use of x0 as operand

sentences.text: C.LD and C.SD instructions can only use `x8-15`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Use of x0 as operand

sentences.text: For the purposes of RVWMO and exception handling, LD and SD instructions are considered to be misaligned loads and stores, with one additional constraint: an LD or SD instruction whose effective address is a multiple of 4 gives rise to two 4-byte memory operations.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Exception Handling

sentences.text: NOTE: This definition permits LD and SD instructions giving rise to exactly one memory access, regardless of alignment.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Exception Handling

sentences.text: If instructions with 4-byte-aligned effective address are decomposed into two 32b operations, there is no constraint on the order in which the operations are performed and each operation is guaranteed to be atomic.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Exception Handling

sentences.text: These decomposed sequences are interruptible.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Exception Handling

sentences.text: Exceptions might occur on subsequent operations, making the effects of previous operations within the same instruction visible.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Exception Handling

sentences.text: NOTE: Software should make no assumptions about the number or order of accesses these instructions might give rise to, beyond the 4-byte constraint mentioned above.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Exception Handling

sentences.text: For example, an interrupted store might overwrite the same bytes upon return from the interrupt handler.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Exception Handling

sentences.text: [insns-ld,reftext="Load doubleword to register pair, 32-bit encoding"]
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Load doubleword to even/odd register pair, 32-bit encoding
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > ld

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: ld rd, offset(rs1)
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > ld

sentences.text: Encoding (RV32):: [wavedrom, ,svg] .... {reg: [ {bits: 7, name: 0x3, attr: ['LOAD'], type: 8}, {bits: 5, name: 'rd', attr: ['dest, dest[0]=0'], type: 2}, {bits: 3, name: 0x3, attr: ['width=D'], type: 8}, {bits: 5, name: 'rs1', attr: ['base'], type: 4}, {bits: 12, name: 'imm[11:0]', attr: ['offset[11:0]'], type: 3}, ]} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > ld

sentences.text: Description:: Loads a 64-bit value into registers `rd` and `rd+1`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > ld

sentences.text: The effective address is obtained by adding register rs1 to the sign-extended 12-bit offset.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > ld

sentences.text: [insns-sd,reftext="Store doubleword from register pair, 32-bit encoding"]
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > ld

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Store doubleword from even/odd register pair, 32-bit encoding
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > sd

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: sd rs2, offset(rs1)
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > sd

sentences.text: Encoding (RV32):: [wavedrom, ,svg] .... {reg: [ {bits: 7, name: 0x23, attr: ['STORE'], type: 8}, {bits: 5, name: 'imm[4:0]', attr: ['offset[4:0]'], type: 3}, {bits: 3, name: 0x3, attr: ['width=D'], type: 8}, {bits: 5, name: 'rs1', attr: ['base'], type: 4}, {bits: 5, name: 'rs2', attr: ['src, src[0]=0'], type: 4}, {bits: 7, name: 'imm[11:5]', attr: ['offset[11:5]'], type: 3}, ]} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > sd

sentences.text: Description:: Stores a 64-bit value from registers `rs2` and `rs2+1`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > sd

sentences.text: The effective address is obtained by adding register rs1 to the sign-extended 12-bit offset.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > sd

sentences.text: [insns-cldsp,reftext="Stack-pointer based load doubleword to register pair, 16-bit encoding"]
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > sd

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Stack-pointer based load doubleword to even/odd register pair, 16-bit encoding
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ldsp

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: c.ldsp rd, offset(sp)
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ldsp

sentences.text: Encoding (RV32):: [wavedrom, ,svg] .... {reg: [ {bits: 2, name: 0x2, type: 8, attr: ['C2']}, {bits: 5, name: 'imm', type: 3, attr: ['offset[4:3|8:6]']}, {bits: 5, name: 'rd', type: 2, attr: ['dest!=0, dest[0]=0']}, {bits: 1, name: 'imm', type: 3, attr: ['offset[5]']}, {bits: 3, name: 0x3, type: 8, attr: ['C.LDSP']}, ], config: {bits: 16}} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ldsp

sentences.text: Description:: Loads stack-pointer relative 64-bit value into registers `rd'` and `rd'+1`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ldsp

sentences.text: It computes its effective address by adding the zero-extended offset, scaled by 8, to the stack pointer, `x2`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ldsp

sentences.text: It expands to `ld rd, offset(x2)`. C.LDSP is only valid when rd{ne}x0; the code points with rd=x0 are reserved.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ldsp

sentences.text: [insns-csdsp,reftext="Stack-pointer based store doubleword from register pair, 16-bit encoding"]
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ldsp

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Stack-pointer based store doubleword from even/odd register pair, 16-bit encoding
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sdsp

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: c.sdsp rs2, offset(sp)
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sdsp

sentences.text: Encoding (RV32):: [wavedrom, ,svg] .... {reg: [ {bits: 2, name: 0x2, type: 8, attr: ['C2']}, {bits: 5, name: 'rs2', type: 4, attr: ['src, src[0]=0']}, {bits: 6, name: 'imm', type: 3, attr: ['offset[5:3|8:6]']}, {bits: 3, name: 0x7, type: 8, attr: ['C.SDSP']}, ], config: {bits: 16}} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sdsp

sentences.text: Description:: Stores a stack-pointer relative 64-bit value from registers `rs2'` and `rs2'+1`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sdsp

sentences.text: It computes an effective address by adding the zero-extended offset, scaled by 8, to the stack pointer, `x2`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sdsp

sentences.text: It expands to `sd rs2, offset(x2)`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sdsp

sentences.text: [insns-cld,reftext="Load doubleword to register pair, 16-bit encoding"]
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sdsp

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Load doubleword to even/odd register pair, 16-bit encoding
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ld

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: c.ld rd', offset(rs1')
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ld

sentences.text: Encoding (RV32):: [wavedrom, ,svg] .... {reg: [ {bits: 2, name: 0x0, type: 8, attr: ['C0']}, {bits: 3, name: 'rd`', type: 2, attr: ['dest, dest[0]=0']}, {bits: 2, name: 'imm', type: 3, attr: ['offset[7:6]']}, {bits: 3, name: 'rs1`', type: 4, attr: ['base']}, {bits: 3, name: 'imm', type: 3, attr: ['offset[5:3]']}, {bits: 3, name: 0x3, type: 8, attr: ['C.LD']}, ], config: {bits: 16}} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ld

sentences.text: Description:: Loads a 64-bit value into registers `rd'` and `rd'+1`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ld

sentences.text: It computes an effective address by adding the zero-extended offset, scaled by 8, to the base address in register rs1'.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ld

sentences.text: [insns-csd,reftext="Store doubleword from register pair, 16-bit encoding"]
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.ld

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Store doubleword from even/odd register pair, 16-bit encoding
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sd

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: c.sd rs2', offset(rs1')
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sd

sentences.text: Encoding (RV32):: [wavedrom, ,svg] .... {reg: [ {bits: 2, name: 0x0, type: 8, attr: ['C0']}, {bits: 3, name: 'rs2`', type: 4, attr: ['src, src[0]=0']}, {bits: 2, name: 'imm', type: 3, attr: ['offset[7:6]']}, {bits: 3, name: 'rs1`', type: 4, attr: ['base']}, {bits: 3, name: 'imm', type: 3, attr: ['offset[5:3]']}, {bits: 3, name: 0x7, type: 8, attr: ['C.SD']}, ], config: {bits: 16}} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sd

sentences.text: Description:: Stores a 64-bit value from registers `rs2'` and `rs2'+1`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sd

sentences.text: It computes an effective address by adding the zero-extended offset, scaled by 8, to the base address in register rs1'.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sd

sentences.text: It expands to `sd rs2', offset(rs1')`.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zilsd", "Zclsd" Extensions for Load/Store pair for RV32, Version 1.0 > Load/Store pair instructions (Zilsd) > Instructions > c.sd
